params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells or activate abilities of a creature or creature card.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells or activate abilities of a creature or creature card.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a creature spell with power 5 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME and untap it.
